meaning: n.娉涙互骞冲師,娑濆師,婕哗
examples: Bottom ground is land in the floodplain of the Missouri River.
Adgantole was a sour-smelling, dusty village beside the Awash River floodplain.
Across an expanse of the Potomac floodplain, airplanes were landing at National Airport.
Scarred foothills converged on the floodplain where villages were marked by the yellow blaze of poplars.
Spokesman Mark Douch said the possibility of restoring a floodplain near Newhaven had been investigated.
